S

saveData() - Method in class BusinessLayer.Project
Saves the current project data to persistent storage.
saveImage(BufferedImage, String) - Method in class DataAccessLayer.FileExporter
Opens a file chooser dialog to save the given image to disk.
savePorjects(Map<String, Object>) - Method in class DataAccessLayer.DataStorage
Saves a project to the database.
savePorjects(Map<String, Object>) - Method in interface DataAccessLayer.Storage
Saves a project to persistent storage.
selected - Variable in class BusinessLayer.Component
True if the component is currently selected
setActiveTool(String) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Canvas
Sets the currently active tool.
setCircuit(Circuit) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Canvas
Sets a new circuit for the canvas.
setCircuitName(String) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Circuit
Sets the name of the circuit.
setcircuits(ArrayList<Circuit>) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Project
Sets the list of circuits in the project.
setComponents(ArrayList<Component>) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Circuit
Sets the list of components in the circuit.
setConnectors(ArrayList<Connector>) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Circuit
Sets the list of connectors (wires) in the circuit.
setCurrentCircuitName(String) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Project
Sets the current circuit name.
setEventHandlers() - Method in class UserInterfaceLayer.MainWindow
Sets up all event handlers for toolbar buttons.
setHeaderFirstPanel() - Static method in class UserInterfaceLayer.MainWindow
Creates the top header panel displaying the project name and software title.
setHeaderSecondPanel() - Static method in class UserInterfaceLayer.MainWindow
Creates the second header panel containing the toolbar with buttons for project operations.
setInitialGUIComponent(Container) - Static method in class UserInterfaceLayer.MainWindow
Sets up the initial GUI layout with header panels, canvas scroll pane, and circuit explorer panel.
setName(String) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Project
Sets the project name.
setSelected(boolean) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Component
Sets the selection state of the component.
setSelected(boolean) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Connector
Sets the selection state.
setState(boolean) - Method in class BusinessLayer.LED
Sets the state of the LED.
setState(boolean) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Switch
Sets the switch state explicitly.
setValue(boolean) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Connector
 
setValue(boolean) - Method in class BusinessLayer.Pin
Sets the boolean value of the pin.
simulateCircuit() - Method in class BusinessLayer.Canvas
Trigger full circuit simulation update.
Storage - Interface in DataAccessLayer
Interface representing a generic storage mechanism for circuits projects.
Switch - Class in BusinessLayer
Represents a digital switch component in a circuit.
Switch(int, int) - Constructor for class BusinessLayer.Switch
Constructs a new Switch at the given (x, y) coordinates.
syncWithCircuit() - Method in class BusinessLayer.Canvas
Synchronizes canvas data with the circuit.
